description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding shelving unit constructed from a dark brown wood or wood-like material. The structure features four evenly spaced open shelves, providing ample storage or display space. The surfaces are flat and the edges are sharply defined, giving the object a modern, minimalist appearance. The back and sides are solid panels, while the front is completely open for easy access to the shelves. The finish appears matte with a subtle wood grain texture visible across all surfaces. This type of shelving unit is commonly found in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas for organizing books, tools, or other items.
description: A dark brown, rectangular open shelving unit with four shelves and a matte wood grain finish. The front is open for easy access, while the sides and back are solid panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the full depth of the unit.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid back panel with no openings or shelves visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid, featureless panel.
